title: alnus serrulatoides
intro: Alnus serrulatoides, also known as the Japanese alder, is a species of tree native to Japan and the Korean Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alnus serrulatoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Alnus serrulatoides is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken to promote relaxation and relieve stress.
